name: @radzor/saml-auth
description: SAML 2.0 SSO authentication for Service Provider-initiated flows. Generates login URLs, validates SAML responses, and extracts user attributes. Uses node:crypto for XML signing.

inputs.name: entityId
inputs.description: Service Provider entity ID (your application identifier).

inputs.name: acsUrl
inputs.description: Assertion Consumer Service URL where the IdP sends SAML responses.

inputs.name: idpLoginUrl
inputs.description: Identity Provider SSO login endpoint URL.

inputs.name: idpCert
inputs.description: Identity Provider's X.509 certificate for signature validation (PEM format).

inputs.name: privateKey
inputs.description: SP private key for signing requests (PEM format). Optional if IdP does not require signed requests.

outputs.name: samlUser
outputs.description: Authenticated user extracted from a valid SAML response.

fields.name: nameId
fields.description: SAML NameID (unique user identifier from IdP).

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: User attributes returned by the IdP.

fields.name: sessionIndex
fields.description: IdP session index for single logout.

fields.name: issuer
fields.description: IdP entity ID that issued the assertion.

events.name: onLoginSuccess
events.description: Fired after a SAML response is successfully validated.

events.name: onLoginFailed
events.description: Fired when SAML response validation fails.

actions.name: generateLoginUrl

params.name: relayState
params.description: URL to redirect to after successful login.

actions.description: Generate a SAML AuthnRequest URL for SP-initiated login.

actions.name: validateResponse

params.name: samlResponse
params.description: Base64-encoded SAML response from the IdP.

actions.description: Validate a SAML response and extract the authenticated user.

actions.name: getMetadata
actions.description: Generate SP metadata XML for IdP configuration.

actions.name: logout

params.name: nameId
params.description: NameID of the user to log out.

params.name: sessionIndex
params.description: Session index from the login assertion.

actions.description: Generate a SAML LogoutRequest URL for single logout.

llm.constraints: Server-only (uses node:crypto). Does not support IdP-initiated login. XML parsing is done with string manipulation and node:crypto — no external XML library needed. The IdP certificate must be provided in PEM format.
